response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has strong software engineering and distributed systems experience with event-driven architectures, microservices, and real-time systems (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby). However, his resume lacks explicit experience with agentic AI systems, fintech infrastructure (e.g., credit risk, working-capital management), or production-scale AI deployment in regulated environments. His AI-agent work at re:cinq is promising but not clearly at the scale or domain depth required for this role. Leadership experience scaling teams is also not prominently demonstrated.
strengths: Deep expertise in event-driven architectures, microservices, and real-time systems (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby)
Strong backend and distributed systems skills with multiple languages (JavaScript/TypeScript, D, C++, Java)
Proven ability to design scalable, maintainable systems and contribute to open-source projects
concerns: No clear experience with agentic AI systems at production scale or in fintech contexts
Lacks demonstrated leadership in scaling engineering teams to 30+ people or developing senior technical leadership layers
Limited exposure to fintech-specific domains like credit risk, working-capital management, or regulatory compliance
